body.title: CLOSED: ADC routing manifest — opinionated task-shape → MCP tool map
body.result: datacenter_manifest tool + routing map; 8 tests; f30794f
body.description:
datacenter_manifest currently lists what exists but does not say when to use each tool. Upgrade it to return an opinionated routing map: task_shape → {tool, when, example}. Both CC (via CAPABILITY CHECK in sprint-ticket) and Igor (via habit routing) consume this manifest to pick the right MCP tool without reasoning overhead or hardcoded heuristics.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/skeleton/manifest.py (or equivalent), agent_datacenter/skeleton/mcp_server.py
**Design rules:** OOP-first (BaseDevice/BaseShim), no SQLite, no TheIgors imports
**Scope boundary:** In scope: add routing_map field to datacenter_manifest tool response; include entries for db_query, web_research, palace_read at minimum. Out of scope: skill file updates (T-skill-capability-check-dynamic), Igor habit wiring.
**Test plan:** Test manifest returns routing_map with entries for known task shapes; test unknown task_shape returns empty gracefully; test each entry has tool + when fields.
